name: Ginger Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the tomatoes in boiling water for 30 seconds, then transfer to an ice bath to stop cooking and peel the skins.
2. Cut the peeled tomatoes into quarters.
3. Add the sugar, cloves, lemon slices, and ginger root to the tomatoes.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
5. Reduce the heat and simmer until the mixture thickens.
6. Pour the sauce into sterilized jars and seal them tightly.
